message:
fix(tui): derive Clone on DashboardMsg for property-based tests

The proptest-based test_properties module (bd-xzt.4.11) requires
DashboardMsg: Clone for strategy composition. All inner types already
derive Clone, so this is a safe addition.

Also includes palette state fields needed by the command palette
overlay wiring (bd-xzt.2.6 follow-up).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
